package rulecoverage

func PositivePgxpoolAcquireInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "pgxpool_acquire_in_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated pgxpool acquire calls inside loops that may churn pooled resources."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
